title: Local AI vs Cloud: Why Your Excel Data Shouldn't Go To Azure! #shorts
summary: Cyril Imhof argues that sensitive data in Excel should remain on-premises rather than sent to cloud services like Azure for AI integration. The recommendation emphasizes privacy preservation and risk avoidance through local model deployment.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof makes the case for keeping sensitive Excel data on-premises instead of routing it to cloud services such as Azure for AI integration. The argument centers on privacy preservation and risk avoidance: running models locally means the data never leaves the environment where it lives. The takeaway is that local inference and edge deployment offer a path to AI-assisted spreadsheet work without exposing confidential data to a cloud provider.
